examination_log.notes: Dr. C independent STT quality certification. WER: 36.8% (C). RTF: 0.0262 (real-time factor, <1 = faster than real-time). Mean latency: 296.5 ms. Peak GPU: 988 MB. Tested on FLEURS spanish dev split (15 clips). Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C) on 2026-04-12.
